en: I do ATM, you do Pierce, it'll be a fresh start for all of us.
ko: 나는 ATM을 하고, 너는 Pierce를 하면, 우리 모두에게 새로운 시작이 될 거야.

en: It'll make things better, and it starts there.
ko: 그러면 상황이 나아질 거고, 거기서 시작해.

en: All you have to do is vote yes and support the deal.
ko: 네가 해야 할 일은 찬성 투표를 하고 거래를 지지하는 거야.

en: Do you know what he's offering? You can separate the personal and the business.
You can reset your dynamic as a family. Oh, super!
Are we gonna be just how we, like, we used to be?
And go on summer vacay together and drive down Route 1 in an RV singing show tunes?
ko: 여름 휴가를 함께 가고, RV를 타고 Route 1을 달리며 쇼튠을 부르는 거야?

en: It may be more complicated than that.
Yeah, I mean, I guess you're still in the honeymoon period, so, you know, getting your own show on TV.
ko: 응, 아직 허니문 기간인 것 같으니까, 네 쇼가 TV에 나오는 거지.

en: Oh, are you not gonna be on TV now? No.
ko: 아, 이제 TV에 안 나올 건가? 아니.

en: I'm sorry, is that not... Has he fucked you on that?
That'll happen. The fucking. But congrats on losing your betrayal charity.
ko: 그런 일은 일어날 거야. 속이는 일.

en: Enough. I thought you'd be interested in an apology, but that, that's enough.
ko: 사과에 관심이 있을 줄 알았는데, 그건 충분해.

en: Wait, I'm sorry, an apology? We missed that.
